output mismatch (see 1483.out.bad)

> Dec 01 20:14:27 a09a3413b742 pmie[1081956]: /etc/pcp/pmie/pmie: Warning: Performance Co-Pilot Inference Engine (pmie) not permanently enabled.
> Dec 01 20:14:27 a09a3413b742 pmie[1081956]:     To enable pmie, run the following as root:
> Dec 01 20:14:27 a09a3413b742 pmie[1081956]:     # /usr/bin/systemctl enable pmie.service
